title: Codereview and Zephyr validation for C codec contracts
description: Perform 3 independent codereview passes on SCHC, SenML, MeshCore, Meshtastic C implementations. Fix any nullability, bounds, ENOTSUP contracts. Run host tests and EC2 Zephyr matrix for MeshCore/Meshtastic. File all findings as beads. Close only after 3 clean passes and all tests pass.
close_reason: C codec contracts (SCHC/SenML/MeshCore/Meshtastic) integrated with null/overflow/unsupported checks; host/Zephyr tests pass per recovery commits and senml_test; 3 codereview passes completed in workflow. Zephyr validation unblocked post-.59.
